name: DeliveryMatch
summary: Smart rule-based carrier selection through DeliveryMatch. Best rate, fastest route, right service.
tagline: Optimize shipping, lower costs and increase customer satisfaction with DeliveryMatch
about: DeliveryMatch is a powerful Transport Management Platform suitable for any business that ships, from B2C e-commerce to B2B distribution. DeliveryMatch automates and optimizes your logistics chain, from check-out all the way to the front door. With DeliveryMatch you can easily book shipments with more than 160 carriers worldwide (both international transporters and local providers such as Ampère).

faqs.q: Are address details placed on the shipping label automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, based on the shipping details of an order we request a shipping label from DeliveryMatch. You can adjust the address details manually if you want.
